business_ideas.idea: Dribble for video: portfolio platform for video editors and motion creators
Thatcher Darby school: STEM-focused private elementary school avoiding woke curricula
Unbundled church services: replace spiritual functions via yoga franchises or wellness
PostPilot: automated direct mail campaigns triggered from ecom customer data
Teacher's Pet: AI-powered lesson plan generator trained on TeachersPayTeachers
Clout revival: social influence scoring for brand influencer vetting
LinkedIn for doctors (Doximity model): niche professional networks beating LinkedIn
Ozempic hotline: old-school lead gen for weight loss telehealth services
Mind Sports recruitment: elite talent pipeline from Olympiad competitors
Church social media services: done-for-you social for declining congregations

predictions.text: Video creators will demand portfolio platforms and hiring tools similar to Dribble
Niche professional networks will outcompete LinkedIn's $20B valuation with premium margins
Direct mail will outperform digital ads for ecom retention campaigns
